## Label checklist
- [ ] Keep `ai:planning` while artifact is being authored.
- [ ] Add `ai:foundation-ready` only when required dependencies exist.
- [ ] Add `ai:approved-for-backlog` after human approval.
- [ ] Set risk label (`risk:low|medium|high`).
- [ ] Set type label (`type:feature|bug|api|design|architecture`).
